sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50949" key="i)sh/goros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσήγορ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n50949.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enjoying equal right of speech, freedom of speech</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:174" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.174</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
